t.t-foreach: sorted(o.flights_pkg, key=lambda l: (l.departures or '', l.arrival or ''))

sorted(o.privatejet_pkg, key=lambda l: (l.departures or '', l.arrival or ''))
sorted(o.yacht_pkg, key=lambda l: (l.date_from or '', l.date_to or ''))
sorted(o.cruises_pkg, key=lambda l: (l.date_from or '', l.date_to or ''))
sorted(o.otherservices_pkg, key=lambda l: (l.date_from or '', l.date_to or ''))
